title: Yanran Lin Selected as CRA-WP Grad Cohort Workshop Scholar (2026)
summary: Yanran Lin was selected as a 2026 CRA-WP Grad Cohort Workshop Scholar, recognizing her momentum in trustworthy CPS and formal methods research.

title: Jared Pratt and Helen Zhang Receive UROP Fellowships for Spring 2026
summary: Jared Pratt and Helen Zhang were awarded UROP fellowships for Spring 2026 to support their undergraduate research contributions in IoTrust Lab.

title: PI Luis Garcia Named an EAI Fellow (2025)
summary: Luis Garcia was honored as an EAI Fellow in the 2025 class for sustained research and community impact in cyber-physical systems security.

title: IoTrust Team Wins Best CE Project at University of Utah ECE Demo Day
summary: Miles Bovero, Burke Dambly, and Lawrence Ponce earned Best CE Project for 'Enhancing Robotic Manipulation with Vision-Enabled Large Language Models.'

title: IoTrust Lab Publishes Three Papers at SmartSP 2025
summary: IoTrust Lab contributed three papers to SmartSP 2025, highlighting new results across CPS security, semantic reverse engineering, and trustworthy system analysis.

title: PI Luis Garcia Served as Chair for SmartSP 2025
summary: Luis Garcia served as chair for SmartSP 2025, helping shape the technical program and community discussions around CPS and smart-vehicle security.
